overall.description: First-person exploration of a dystopian urban drainage channel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring concrete walls with graffiti, scattered trash, makeshift homeless shelters, and abandoned vehicles under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel with homeless encampment

events.description: camera slows to examine the makeshift table with scattered items and open book

agents.ego_description: walking through the concrete channel and approaching a makeshift living area with a metal table and scattered belongings

notable_agents.action: sitting against the concrete wall near piles of trash bags

steep concrete drainage channel wall with weathered surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a concrete drainage channel with steep walls covered in graffiti. The camera approaches a makeshift encampment where NPCs sit against the wall near trash bags. A black container sits to the right while the camera moves toward a metal table with an open book and food items, slowing to examine the details of the scattered belongings.

events.description: leaving the initial encampment area into the wider open channel
approaching the barricaded section with scattered tires visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the concrete channel toward a distant barricade

entered.detail: concrete barrier with red and white stripes blocking part of the channel
pile of black vehicle tires scattered along the right wall
damaged and abandoned sedan parked against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the encampment into a wider section of the drainage channel. The concrete walls continue on both sides with visible graffiti, while the path ahead shows a barricaded area with scattered tires and an abandoned car. The overpass structure looms closer as the camera advances through the empty channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: barricaded channel section with vehicle obstacles

events.description: navigating through the gap in the concrete barricades
entering the makeshift shelter area with canopy coverage

agents.ego_description: carefully moving past the concrete barricades and navigating around the abandoned car and tire piles

entered.detail: large yellow patio umbrella providing shade over a living area
gray and white striped tarp draped over poles creating a shelter
wooden pallets and boards forming a low barrier
small blue three-wheeled food cart with storage compartments

segments.scene_description: The camera navigates through a narrow passage between red and white concrete barricades, passing piles of tires and an abandoned sedan. The space opens into a makeshift shelter area featuring a yellow umbrella, striped canvas tarp, and a blue food cart, indicating a more established living space within the channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift outdoor living space with cooking area

events.description: passing the burning barrel with visible flames and smoke
exiting the shelter area past the graffiti-covered wall

agents.ego_description: exploring the detailed makeshift shelter, examining the food cart and burning barrel before moving past graffiti-covered walls toward the open channel

entered.detail: metal barrel with active fire burning inside, emitting smoke
large red and black graffiti reading CORPORATE MUST DIE on the concrete wall
blue plastic chairs arranged around the living area
wooden table with various bottles and items on surface

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a detailed makeshift shelter featuring a burning barrel, blue food cart, and wooden table with chairs under a yellow umbrella. The segment highlights the 'CORPORATE MUST DIE' graffiti on the wall as the camera moves past the shelter area, transitioning back toward the open channel with the overpass visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a concrete drainage channel that shifts from an intimate look at a makeshift camp to a wider view of an abandoned urban wasteland. It begins by gliding past graffiti-covered walls toward a small encampment where figures sit amidst trash bags and a black container. As the camera slows to examine a metal table cluttered with an open book and food, the focus lingers on the scattered belongings of the inhabitants. The scene then opens up as the camera moves away from the camp and advances into a broader section of the channel, passing under a looming overpass. Finally, the path expands toward a barricaded area filled with scattered tires and a derelict car abandoned in the empty concrete corridor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow concrete corridor that opens into a detailed makeshift living area within a drainage channel. It begins by navigating between red and white concrete barricades, passing piles of tires and an abandoned sedan. As the passage widens, the scene expands into a shelter area characterized by a yellow umbrella, striped canvas tarps, and a blue food cart. The camera then lingers on the domestic details of the camp, passing a burning barrel and a wooden table with chairs before gliding past a wall marked with CORPORATE MUST DIE graffiti. Finally, the view shifts away from the shelter, moving back toward the open expanse of the channel with a distant overpass visible under the bright sun.
